title: SICS Human-State Proxy Benchmark Labels Schema v0.1
description: Schema for validating one row object from labels.csv in the SICS Human-State Proxy Benchmark Track synthetic/sample package. This schema is for public helper use only. It does not define CAIS, does not define Sal-Meter, does not grant compliance, does not validate any benchmark result, and does not create diagnostic, therapeutic, clinical, surveillance, employment, insurance, educational, legal, or eligibility authority.

label_id.description: Unique label identifier within the synthetic/sample session.

start_time.description: Label window start timestamp. Used by the current synthetic labels.csv structure.

end_time.description: Label window end timestamp. Used by the current synthetic labels.csv structure.

label_start.description: Alternative label window start timestamp for charter-compatible future files.

label_end.description: Alternative label window end timestamp for charter-compatible future files.

window_label.description: Synthetic or research-stage label for the time window. This is not a diagnosis, not a clinical label, not a psychological truth claim, not a Sal-Meter output, and not a CAIS index.

label_family.description: Optional higher-level session label family for future schema expansion. This remains a research-stage proxy/session label only.

label_confidence.description: Optional label confidence for synthetic/sample or future internal use. This must not be treated as diagnostic certainty.

label_source.description: Origin of the label. Public synthetic data should normally use synthetic or operator-demo labels only.

note.description: Boundary or window note. Must not contain participant identifiers, clinical interpretation, Sal-Meter validation claims, or CAIS compliance claims.

notes.description: Alternative plural note field for charter-compatible future files. Must not contain participant identifiers, clinical interpretation, Sal-Meter validation claims, or CAIS compliance claims.

raw_human_data_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. For public sample data this must be false.

clinical_label_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. Public proxy labels must not be clinical labels.

diagnostic_label_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. Public proxy labels must not be diagnostic labels.

sal_meter_input_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. For current proxy sample data this must be false.

cais_compliance_claim_present.description: Optional explicit declaration. For public helper files this must be false.
